description:
You are a Performance Engineer at a SaaS company investigating potential CPU behavior drift following a recent deployment. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Baseline Deviation Analysis' containing exactly three graphs with the following exact titles and targets:

- Title: 'CPU Deviation from Baseline', Target: diffSeries(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, movingAverage(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, 50))
- Title: 'Instance 1 CPU Fleet Share', Target: asPercent(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, sumSeries(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization, servers.ec2_instance_3.cpu.
